name: design-planning
description: Turn product and visual design decisions into implementation-ready plans.

interface.shortDescription: Turn design decisions into implementation-ready plans
interface.longDescription: Use an adaptive question-and-answer workflow to clarify product and visual design decisions, compare tradeoffs, and produce sequenced implementation work with acceptance criteria and validation.
defaultPrompt: Use $plan-design-decisions to interview me and create an implementation-ready design plan.
